reply.findTool: Aquí tienes herramientas que coinciden con lo que describes:
reply.explainTool: Esta herramienta convierte las entradas de tu trabajo en un veredicto claro con los factores de riesgo que lo sustentan:
reply.inputs: Introduces los costes, cantidades y tarifas esenciales de tu trabajo. Los campos obligatorios se mantienen al mínimo y los opcionales afinan el resultado.
reply.results: El resultado es un veredicto con las métricas y los factores de riesgo que lo sustentan, para ver por qué queda donde queda y qué ajustar.
reply.approvedReports: Los resultados premium pueden guardarse como resúmenes de decisión exportables para revisión interna del equipo.
reply.trustTrace: El Resumen del cálculo registra entradas, supuestos y pasos de validación para mostrar cómo se produjo el resultado.
reply.regionalUnits: SectorCalc admite unidades métricas, imperiales y regionales, y muestra las conversiones que utilizó.
reply.benchmarks: SectorCalc muestra un contexto de referencia regional indicativo junto a tu resultado — para orientación, no son cifras oficiales.
reply.pricing: Puedes ver los planes y qué incluye cada uno en la página de precios:
reply.enterprise: Para uso en equipo, gobernanza de informes, paquetes y compras, consulta la página Enterprise:
reply.about: SectorCalc es una plataforma global de cálculo industrial y apoyo a la decisión que revela pérdidas ocultas y convierte el cálculo en decisiones fiables:
reply.blockedFormula: No puedo realizar cálculos ni compartir fórmulas. Abre la herramienta correspondiente y calculará el resultado por ti.
reply.blockedPrivate: No puedo acceder a datos privados, cuentas ni secretos, y no puedo saltarme ninguna restricción.
reply.fallback: Puedo ayudarte a encontrar la herramienta adecuada, entender entradas y resultados, y navegar por SectorCalc. Prueba una de estas:

premiumSeo.metaTitle: {tool} | Guía de precio, margen y riesgo | SectorCalc
premiumSeo.metaDescription: Cómo funciona {tool}, para quién es, qué introduces y cómo leer el resultado. Soporte a la decisión sobre precio y riesgo de margen de SectorCalc.
premiumSeo.h1: {tool}: pon precio al trabajo y protege el margen
premiumSeo.intro: {tool} te ayuda a poner a prueba un trabajo antes de comprometerte con un precio. Convierte tus costes, cantidades y tarifas en una lectura clara de margen y riesgo, para detectar los factores ocultos que erosionan el beneficio en silencio y decidir con confianza en vez de adivinar en la oferta.
premiumSeo.howTo: Introduce {inputs} para tu escenario de {sector}. SectorCalc ejecuta fórmulas deterministas gobernadas y devuelve {outputs}. Añade campos opcionales para afinar umbrales y riesgos.
premiumSeo.method: {tool} usa la capa de gobernanza de fórmulas de SectorCalc: entradas validadas, pipeline determinista y comprobaciones de umbral. Simulación técnica — no asesoramiento financiero, legal ni de ingeniería.
premiumSeo.mistakes: Tarifas obsoletas, campos opcionales omitidos, unidades mezcladas y leer el resultado como beneficio garantizado son errores habituales. {pain} Verifica las entradas antes de decidir.
premiumSeo.problem: La mayoría de los trabajos pierden margen mucho antes de la factura, cuando la preparación, los retrabajos, los sobrecostes y las partidas mal valoradas nunca se suman antes de enviar el presupuesto. {tool} hace visibles esos factores para que dejen de sorprenderte.
premiumSeo.help: Aplica el motor de cálculo determinista de SectorCalc a tus datos y resalta los factores que más mueven el resultado. Obtienes una lectura estructurada y defendible, no un número de caja negra.
premiumSeo.who: Operadores, estimadores, propietarios y responsables que ponen precio al trabajo, revisan ofertas o necesitan una base coherente en el equipo son quienes más aprovechan {tool}.
premiumSeo.inputs: Los campos principales incluyen {inputs} ({inputCount} entradas en total). Los obligatorios se mantienen al mínimo; los opcionales afinan el veredicto.
premiumSeo.outputs: {tool} devuelve {outputs} con métricas, alertas de umbral y factores de riesgo — ves por qué el número queda donde queda.
premiumSeo.trustTitle: Resúmenes de decisión premium y Resumen del cálculo
premiumSeo.trust: Los resultados premium pueden incluir un Resumen del cálculo guardado como resumen de decisión exportable.

faq.a: Puede previsualizar el enfoque gratis; veredicto completo, métricas y resumen de decisión premium están incluidos en SectorCalc Pro.
No. Es una simulación técnica y una herramienta de apoyo a la decisión, no asesoramiento financiero, legal ni de ingeniería. Verifica los resultados antes de decidir.
Los resultados reflejan tus entradas y el motor determinista de SectorCalc. Mejores entradas producen una lectura más fina y defendible.
Sí. Los resultados premium pueden exportarse como resúmenes de decisión con un Resumen del cálculo.
Está ajustada a los patrones de precio y margen de su sector y convive con el resto del conjunto de 27 sectores de SectorCalc.
Abre el analizador, introduce {inputs} y revisa {outputs}. Ajusta las entradas para probar el escenario.

items.q: ¿En qué se diferencia Business de Enterprise?
items.a: Business cubre calculadoras premium, resúmenes de decisión premium y flujos de campo. Enterprise añade gobernanza y paquetes.
Sí. SectorCalc cubre 27 sectores, y los paquetes sectoriales agrupan los calculadoras que tus equipos usan más.
Los resúmenes de decisión premium incluyen un resumen del cálculo para revisión interna.
Solicita una demo y hablaremos de tus sectores, el tamaño de tu equipo y tu despliegue. Los precios de los planes individuales están en la página de precios.

homeAbout.title: Sobre nosotros
homeAbout.paragraph1: La rentabilidad suele escaparse de las empresas a través de costos inadvertidos, no de las ventas. Precios incorrectos, errores de cálculo, desperdicio, pérdida de eficiencia y una débil disciplina de cotización erosionan los márgenes en silencio con el tiempo.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc está diseñado para hacer cuantificables estas pérdidas invisibles. Eleva las decisiones de costo, propuesta, eficiencia y riesgo a una base más rápida, más transparente y más confiable.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: La precisión en el cálculo es la base de un rendimiento confiable.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: Una plataforma para exponer pérdidas ocultas,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: y transformar el cálculo en apoyo confiable a la decisión.
homeAbout.ctaAria: Lee la historia completa de SectorCalc

aboutPage.seoTitle: Acerca de SectorCalc | Cálculo industrial y apoyo a la decisión
aboutPage.seoDescription: SectorCalc ayuda a las empresas a exponer pérdidas ocultas, cuantificar riesgos operativos y convertir los cálculos industriales en apoyo confiable a la decisión.

hero.title: El cálculo, convertido en decisiones confiables.
hero.lead: SectorCalc es una plataforma global de cálculo industrial y apoyo a la decisión que ayuda a las empresas a exponer pérdidas ocultas y actuar con confianza.

why.title: Por qué existe SectorCalc
why.body: La mayoría de las pérdidas operativas nunca aparecen en una factura. Se esconden en los precios, el desperdicio, el tiempo de preparación, las caídas de eficiencia y la débil disciplina de cotización, y erosionan los márgenes en silencio durante años.

what.title: Qué es SectorCalc
what.body: Un conjunto enfocado de calculadoras sectoriales e informes de decisión que convierten datos operativos en bruto en cifras claras y defendibles, ni otra hoja de cálculo ni un ERP pesado.

problem.title: El problema que resolvemos
problem.body: Los equipos toman decisiones de costo, cotización y riesgo con información incompleta. SectorCalc hace medible lo invisible, para que las decisiones se basen en evidencia y no en suposiciones.

how.title: Cómo funciona nuestro sistema
how.body: Usted aporta las entradas que conoce; el sistema resuelve lo requerido, ejecuta cálculos deterministas gobernados y valida cada resultado frente a invariantes y referencias antes de mostrarlo.

different.title: Qué nos hace diferentes
different.body: Cada resultado incluye un resumen del cálculo transparente, benchmarks regionales indicativos y supuestos documentados que su equipo puede revisar antes de decidir.

who.title: Para quién está hecho
who.body: Para propietarios, estimadores, equipos de campo y consultores que necesitan respuestas rápidas y confiables sin contratar un área de precios completa ni desplegar software empresarial.

building.title: Qué estamos construyendo
building.body: Un estándar global de inteligencia de cálculo sectorial, que se expande por las industrias manteniendo cada fórmula gobernada, auditable y confiable.

manifesto.primary: Una plataforma para exponer pérdidas ocultas,
manifesto.secondary: y transformar el cálculo en apoyo confiable a la decisión.

premiumSchemaPage.bullet3: PDF y CSV listos para exportar en planes de pago

length.label: Longitud
length.helper: Longitud del concrete slab or structure in meters. Based on ISO 9001 measurement standards.

width.label: Ancho
width.helper: Ancho del concrete element in meters. Typical for industrial floors and foundations.

depth.label: Profundidad / Espesor
depth.helper: Espesor del concrete pour in meters. Common range for slabs: 0.1–0.3 m.

shape.label: Shape
shape.helper: Geometric shape del pour Área. Affects Volumenn calculation and Despordicio factors.

wastefactor.label: Despordicio Factor
wastefactor.helper: Expected Material Despordicio due to spillage, over-excavation, or formwork leakage. Lean Objetivo < 3%.

compressionstrength.label: Compression Strength Class
compressionstrength.helper: Concrete strength class por EN 206. Higher strength increases Costoo and reduces Volumenn yield slightly.

reinforcementratio.label: Reinforcement Ratio
reinforcementratio.helper: Steel reinforcement as porcentage of concrete Volumenn. Typical range 0.5–3% for structural slabs.

laborrate.label: Labor Tasa
laborrate.helper: Hourly labor Costoo for concrete placement and finishing. Based on regional wage data.

materialcostperm3.label: Material Costoo por m³
materialcostperm3.helper: Costoo of ready-mix concrete delivered to site. Includes additives if specified.

usepump.label: Use Concrete Pump
usepump.helper: Indicates if a concrete pump is required for placement. Adds Costoo and reduces Despordicio.

loan_amount.label: Loan Importe
loan_amount.helper: Total Capital borrowed, typically 80% of proporty Valor.

down_payment_percent.label: Down Payment porcentage
down_payment_percent.helper: porcentage of proporty Precio paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

annual_interest_rate.label: Annual Interest Tasa
annual_interest_rate.helper: Nominal Tasa anual, fixed or variable. usado for monthly compounding.

loan_term_years.label: Loan Plazo (Años)
loan_term_years.helper: Duración del mortgage in Años. Standard Plazos: 15, 20, 30.

property_tax_rate.label: Proporty Tax Tasa
property_tax_rate.helper: Annual proporty tax as porcentage of proporty Valor. Varies by jurisdiction.

insurance_rate.label: Home Insurance Tasa
insurance_rate.helper: Annual homeowner's insurance as porcentage of proporty Valor.

monthly_hoa.label: Monthly HOA Fee
monthly_hoa.helper: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

annual_income.label: Annual Gross Income
annual_income.helper: Total annual household income before taxes. usado for DTI calculation.

monthly_debt.label: Monthly Existing Debt Payments
monthly_debt.helper: Recurring monthly debt obligations (car loans, student loans, credit cards).

payment_frequency.label: Payment Frequency
payment_frequency.helper: How often payments are made. AcceleTasad biweekly results in 13 full payments por year.

principal.label: Capital Importe
principal.helper: Initial investment or loan Importe in base currency.

annualinterestrate.label: Annual Interest Tasa
annualinterestrate.helper: Nominal annual interest Tasa as a porcentage.

compoundingfrequency.label: Compounding Frequency
compoundingfrequency.helper: Number of compounding poriods por year (e.g., 1=annual, 12=monthly, 365=daily).

timeperiod.label: Tiempo poriod
timeperiod.helper: Total Duración of investment or loan in Años.

additionalcontribution.label: Additional Contribution por poriod
additionalcontribution.helper: Fixed Importe added at the end of each compounding poriod.

inflationrate.label: Inflation Tasa
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual inflation Tasa for real Valor Adjustment.

taxrate.label: Tax Tasa on Interest
taxrate.helper: porcentage of interest earnings taxed annually.

list_price.label: List Precio (por unit)
list_price.helper: Standard Selling Precio before any discount, as defined in ISO 9001 Costoo accounting procedures.

discount_percent.label: Discount porcentage
discount_percent.helper: Negotiated or promotional discount off list Precio, typical in Lean pricing stTasagies.

quantity.label: Order Cantidad
quantity.helper: Number of units in the transaction, usado for Volumenn-based discount analysis por WERC DC metrics.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Costoooo por Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Material, labor, and variable overhead por unit (ISO 14051 MFCA standard).

fixed_cost_allocation.label: Fixed Costoooo Allocation (total)
fixed_cost_allocation.helper: Allocated Fixed Costoooos for the order batch (e.g., Preparación, engineering, admin) por Lean Costoo deployment.

discount_type.label: Discount Type
discount_type.helper: Method of discount application: porcentage off list or fixed dollar Importe por unit.

apply_to_all_units.label: Apply Discount to All Units
apply_to_all_units.placeholder: Introduzca apply discount to all units
apply_to_all_units.helper: If true, discount applies to entire Cantidad; if false, only to incremental units (tiered pricing).

total_units.label: Total Units Produced
total_units.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting poriod (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

defective_units.label: Defective Units
defective_units.helper: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

rework_units.label: Rework Units
rework_units.helper: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean Despordicio reduction).

scrap_units.label: Scrap Units
scrap_units.helper: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (Material yield loss).

target_yield.label: Objetivo Yield (%)
target_yield.helper: Desired first-pass yield porcentage (Six Sigma Objetivo ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).

process_type.label: Process Type
process_type.helper: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).

include_scrap_in_defect.label: Include Scrap in Defect Count
include_scrap_in_defect.placeholder: Introduzca include scrap in defect count
include_scrap_in_defect.helper: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect Tasa calculation.

fixed_costs.label: Total Fixed Costoooos (por poriod)
fixed_costs.helper: Sum of all Fixed Costoooos (alquiler, salaries, insurance, depreciation) for the poriod. ISO 9001:2015 clause 7.1.4.

variable_cost_per_unit.label: Variable Costoooo por Unit
variable_cost_per_unit.helper: Direct Material, direct labor, and variable overhead por unit. Lean manufacturing standard Costoo approach.

selling_price_per_unit.label: Selling Precio por Unit
selling_price_per_unit.helper: Netoo Selling Precio after discounts and returns. WERC DC Metrics benchmark.

defect_rate.label: Defect Tasa (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts por million defective. Six Sigma DMAIC metric. Typical baseline 5000 ppm (3.8 sigma).

rework_cost_per_unit.label: Rework Costoo por Defective Unit
rework_cost_per_unit.placeholder: Introduzca rework Costoo por defective unit
rework_cost_per_unit.helper: Costoo to rework or scrap a defective unit. Includes labor, Material, and overhead.

production_volume.label: Actual Production Volumenn (units)
production_volume.helper: Total units produced in the poriod. usado for actual vs. break-even comparison.

cost_allocation_method.label: Costoo Allocation Method
cost_allocation_method.helper: Traditional uses single overhead Tasa; activity-based uses multiple Costoo drivers. ABC is recommended for ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3.

annual_revenue.label: Annual Revenue (USD)
annual_revenue.helper: Total annual revenue del facility or business unit.

operating_margin.label: Oporating Margin (%)
operating_margin.helper: Corriente oporating profit margin as a porcentage of revenue.

total_inventory_value.label: Total Inventory Valor (USD)
total_inventory_value.helper: Corriente Valor of all inventory held (raw Materials, WIP, finished goods).

inventory_carrying_cost_percent.label: Inventory Carrying Costoo (% of inventory Valor)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.placeholder: Introduzca inventory carrying Costoo (% of inventory valor)
inventory_carrying_cost_percent.helper: Annual Costoo to hold inventory (storage, insurance, obsolescence, capital Costoo). Typical range 20-30%.

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Direct Labor Costoo (USD)
annual_labor_cost.helper: Total annual Costoo of direct labor in the oporation.

defect_rate_percent.label: Defect Tasa (%)
defect_rate_percent.helper: porcentage of products that do not meet quality standards (Six Sigma metric).

cost_per_defect.label: Costoo por Defect (USD)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Costoo incurred por defective unit (rework, scrap, warranty).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energía Costoo (USD)
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual Energía expenditure for the facility.

lean_implementation_cost.label: Lean Implementation Costoo (USD)
lean_implementation_cost.helper: One-Tiempo Costoo for implementing Lean/Six Sigma improvements (training, tools, consulting).

expected_improvement_factor.label: Expected Improvement Factor (0-1)
expected_improvement_factor.helper: Expected fractional improvement from Lean initiatives (e.g., 0.15 = 15% reduction in Despordicio).

industry_type.label: Industry Type
industry_type.helper: Type of industrial oporation for benchmarking and standard adjustments.

iso_certified.label: ISO 9001 Certified
iso_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility is ISO 9001 certified, affecting quality Costoo baselines.

direct_labor_hours.label: Direct Labor Horas por Unit
direct_labor_hours.placeholder: Introduzca direct labor horas por unit
direct_labor_hours.helper: Standard Tiempo por unit from Tiempo studies (ISO 9001 clause 7.1.4).

hourly_wage.label: Average Hourly Wage
hourly_wage.helper: Pesoed average of direct labor wages including shift diffealquilerials.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Tasa
overhead_rate.helper: Includes facility, utilities, indirect labor, and depreciation (WERC DC Measures).

tooling_cost_per_unit.label: Tooling Costoo por Unit
tooling_cost_per_unit.helper: Amortized Costoo of jigs, fixtures, and porishable tools (Lean TPM).

quality_cost_per_unit.label: Quality Costoo por Unit
quality_cost_per_unit.helper: Costoo of inspection, rework, scrap, and warranty (Six Sigma COPQ).

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced por Preparación (Lean SMED).

setup_time_hours.label: Preparación Tiempo por Batch
setup_time_hours.helper: Tiempo to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

profit_margin.label: Objetivo Profit Margin
profit_margin.helper: Desired markup over Total Costoooo (stTasagic pricing).

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: ISO 4217 currency code for financial reporting.

include_setup.label: Include Preparación Costoo in Tasa
include_setup.placeholder: Introduzca include preparación Costoo in tasa
include_setup.helper: If true, Preparación Tiempo is amortized across batch size.

avg_days_receivable.label: Average Días Receivable (DSO)
avg_days_receivable.helper: Average number of Días to collect payment after a sale. High DSO indicates potential cash Flujo issues.

avg_days_payable.label: Average Días Payable (DPO)
avg_days_payable.helper: Average number of Días to pay suppliers. Higher DPO can improve cash Flujo but may strain supplier relationships.

inventory_days.label: Inventory Días (DII)
inventory_days.helper: Average number of Días inventory is held before sale. High DII ties up cash and increases holding Costoos.

operating_expenses_daily.label: Daily Oporating Expenses
operating_expenses_daily.helper: Total daily oporating Costoos including labor, Materials, overhead. usado to compute cash gap in moNetooary Plazos.

revenue_daily.label: Daily Revenue
revenue_daily.helper: Average daily revenue from sales. usado to compute cash conversion cycle and gap.

payment_terms_suppliers.label: Supplier Payment Plazos
payment_terms_suppliers.helper: Standard payment Plazos offered by suppliers. Affects DPO and cash gap.

customer_payment_behavior.label: Customer Payment Behavior
customer_payment_behavior.helper: Historical customer payment behavior. Adjusts effective DSO.

lean_inventory_flag.label: Lean Inventory Practices Active
lean_inventory_flag.helper: Indicates if Lean inventory methods (e.g., JIT) are in place to reduce inventory Días.

six_sigma_quality_level.label: Six Sigma Quality Level (Sigma)
six_sigma_quality_level.helper: Corriente process sigma level. Higher sigma indicates fewer defects and less cash tied up in rework/scrap.

cutting_length.label: Cutting Longitud
cutting_length.helper: Total Longitud del tool path in contact with the workpiece. Derived from CAM or drawing.

feed_rate.label: Feed Tasa
feed_rate.helper: Linear feed speed del cutting tool. Based on Material and tool specifications.

spindle_speed.label: Spindle Speed
spindle_speed.helper: Rotational speed del spindle. Affects cutting speed and surface finish.

number_of_passes.label: Number of Passes
number_of_passes.helper: Number of cutting passes required to achieve final geometry.

rapid_traverse_distance.label: Rapid Traverse Distancia
rapid_traverse_distance.helper: Total Distancia traveled at rapid traverse (non-cutting moves).

rapid_traverse_rate.label: Rapid Traverse Tasa
rapid_traverse_rate.helper: Maximum speed del machine during rapid moves.

tool_change_time.label: Tool Change Tiempo
tool_change_time.helper: Average Tiempo to change a tool, including turret indexing.

number_of_tool_changes.label: Number of Tool Changes
number_of_tool_changes.helper: Total tool changes required for the oporation.

material_hardness_factor.label: Material Hardness Factor
material_hardness_factor.helper: Adjusts cutting Tiempo based on Material machinability. Refer to ISO 3685.

tool_wear_factor.label: Tool Wear Factor
tool_wear_factor.helper: Multiplier for tool wear. 1.0 = new tool, >1.0 = worn tool. Based on tool life data.

machine_efficiency.label: Machine Efficiency
machine_efficiency.helper: Efectividad global del equipo (OEE) factor. Accounts for downtime, speed loss, and quality loss.

part_loading_time.label: Part Loading/Unloading Tiempo
part_loading_time.helper: Tiempo to load and unload the workpiece from the machine.

coolant_on_time.label: Coolant On Tiempo
coolant_on_time.helper: Tiempo for coolant to activate and stabilize before cutting.

measurement_time.label: In-Process Measurement Tiempo
measurement_time.helper: Tiempo for probing or manual measurement during the cycle.

energy_consumption_kwh.label: Energía Consumo (kWh)
energy_consumption_kwh.helper: Total metered kilowatt-Horas for the billing poriod. usado as primary driver for Energía Costoo.

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)
peak_demand_kw.helper: Highest 15-minute average demand in the poriod. Drives demand charges por utility tariff.

energy_rate_per_kwh.label: Energía Tasa ($/kWh)
energy_rate_per_kwh.helper: Blended Energía charge from utility bill, including generation and transmission.

demand_rate_per_kw.label: Demand Tasa ($/kW)
demand_rate_per_kw.helper: Monthly demand charge por kW of peak demand, varies by utility and region.

power_factor.label: Potencia Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real Potencia to appaalquiler Potencia. Low PF incurs penalties por utility tariff.

pf_penalty_threshold.label: PF Penalty Threshold
pf_penalty_threshold.helper: Minimum Potencia factor before penalty applies, typically 0.9 por utility standards.

pf_penalty_rate.label: PF Penalty Tasa ($/kvar)
pf_penalty_rate.helper: Costoo por reactive Potencia (kvar) when PF below threshold.

system_efficiency.label: System Efficiency (%)
system_efficiency.helper: Overall electrical system efficiency including transformers, cables, and motors. usado for loss adjustment.

operating_hours.label: Oporating Horas por Month
operating_hours.helper: Total Horas the facility opeTasas in the billing poriod. usado for Factor de carga calculation.

tariff_type.label: Tariff Type
tariff_type.helper: Utility Tasa structure. Affects how Energía and demand charges are calculated.

include_demand_charge.label: Include Demand Charge
include_demand_charge.helper: Toggle to include or exclude demand charges from Total Costoooo.

compressor_power_rating.label: Compressor Motor Potencia Rating
compressor_power_rating.helper: Nameplate Potencia del compressor motor. Typically from 5 kW to 5000 kW for industrial units.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency del electric motor driving the compressor. Premium efficiency motors (IE3/IE4) are >90%.

compressor_type.label: Compressor Type
compressor_type.helper: Diffealquiler compressor types have diffealquiler specific Potencia curves and maintenance profiles.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oporating Horas por Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Total annual oporating Horas. Typical industrial: 8000 Horas (2 shifts, 5 Días).

load_factor.label: Factor de carga (Average % of Full Load)
load_factor.placeholder: Introduzca factor de carga (average % of full load)
load_factor.helper: Average porcentage of full load capacity at which the compressor opeTasas. Includes part-load and unloaded poriods.

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Costoo
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Blended average Costoo por kWh including demand charges. Typical range $0.05-$0.30.

leakage_percentage.label: Estimated System Leakage
leakage_percentage.helper: porcentage of compressed air lost through leaks. Typical industrial systems: 20-30%.

pressure_setpoint.label: System Presión Setpoint
pressure_setpoint.helper: Oporating Presión at the compressor discharge. Higher Presión increases Energía Consumo by ~1% por 0.1 bar.

ambient_temperature.label: Average Ambient Temporature
ambient_temperature.helper: Average ambient temporature at compressor intake. Higher temporature reduces air Densidad and increases Potencia.

has_vsd.label: Variable Speed Drive (VSD) Installed
has_vsd.helper: VSD can reduce Energía Consumo by 15-35% under part-load conditions.

maintenance_quality.label: Maintenance Quality Level
maintenance_quality.helper: Maintenance quality affects efficiency, leakage, and Presión drop. Poor maintenance can increase Energía use by 10-20%.

length_cm.label: Longitud (cm)
length_cm.helper: Physical Longitud del package in centimeters. ISO 1:2016 standard for geometric product specifications.

width_cm.label: Ancho (cm)
width_cm.helper: Physical Ancho del package in centimeters.

height_cm.label: Altura (cm)
height_cm.helper: Physical Altura del package in centimeters.

actual_weight_kg.label: Actual Peso (kg)
actual_weight_kg.helper: Gross Peso del package including packaging. por ISO 80000-4:2006.

carrier_factor.label: Carrier DIM Factor
carrier_factor.helper: Volumenntric Divisor usado by carrier (e.g., FedEx/UPS: 5000, DHL: 5000, Air freight: 6000). WERC standard.

package_type.label: Package Type
package_type.helper: Type of packaging influences dimensional stability and handling. Lean packaging standard.

is_stackable.label: Stackable
is_stackable.helper: Indicates if package can be stacked. Affects storage Densidad and handling Costoo. Six Sigma Material Flujo optimization.

hazardous_material.label: Hazardous Material
hazardous_material.helper: Indicates if contents are hazardous (IMO/ADR/IATA). Affects surcharges and handling restrictions.

distance_km.label: Route Distancia (km)
distance_km.helper: Total one-way Distancia del route. usado as primary driver for Combustible, labor, and maintenance Costoos.

fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.label: Combustible Consumo (L/100km)
fuel_consumption_l_per_100km.helper: Average Combustible Consumo del vehicle. Based on manufacturer data or telematics.

fuel_price_per_l.label: Combustible Precio (por liter)
fuel_price_per_l.helper: Corriente market Precio of diesel or gasoline. Updated weekly.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage (€/hour)
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Gross hourly wage including social charges. Based on collective labor agreements.

average_speed_kmh.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmh.helper: Expected average speed including traffic and stops. se utiliza para calcular travel Tiempo.

maintenance_cost_per_km.label: Maintenance Costoo (€/km)
maintenance_cost_per_km.helper: Average maintenance Costoo por kilometer including tires, oil, and repairs. Based on fleet data.

toll_cost_total.label: Total Toll Costoo (€)
toll_cost_total.helper: Sum of all Peajes on the route. Can be obtained from route planning software.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Peso (tonnes)
load_weight_tonnes.helper: Total Peso of cargo. Affects Combustible Consumo and wear.

route_type.label: Route Type
route_type.helper: Characterizes the terrain and traffic conditions. Influences Combustible Consumo and speed.

is_return_trip.label: Return Trip Included
is_return_trip.helper: If true, Distancia and Costoos are doubled (round trip).

distance_km.label: Distancia (km)
distance_km.helper: Total route Distancia from origin to destination, usado for Combustible and Tiempo Costoo calculations.

fuel_cost_per_liter.label: Combustible Costoo por Liter
fuel_cost_per_liter.helper: Corriente average Combustible Precio por liter, directly impacts variable Transportee Costoo.

fuel_efficiency_kmpl.label: Combustible Efficiency (km/L)
fuel_efficiency_kmpl.helper: Vehicle Combustible Consumo Tasa in kilometers por liter, key for Combustible Costoo estimation.

driver_wage_per_hour.label: Driver Wage por Hour
driver_wage_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage del driver, including benefits and overtime provisions.

average_speed_kmph.label: Average Speed (km/h)
average_speed_kmph.helper: Expected average travel speed including traffic and stops, usado to compute travel Tiempo.

load_weight_kg.label: Load Peso (kg)
load_weight_kg.helper: Total Peso of cargo, affects Combustible Consumo and handling Costoos.

handling_cost_per_kg.label: Handling Costoo por kg
handling_cost_per_kg.helper: Costoo for loading/unloading and warehouse handling por kilogram of cargo.

vehicle_maintenance_per_km.label: Vehicle Maintenance por km
vehicle_maintenance_per_km.helper: Average maintenance Costoo por kilometer, including tires, oil, and repairs.

toll_cost.label: Toll Costoo
toll_cost.helper: Total toll charges along the route, if applicable.

insurance_rate_per_kg.label: Insurance Tasa por kg
insurance_rate_per_kg.helper: Insurance premium por kilogram of cargo Valor, covering risk during transit.

overhead_percentage.label: Overhead porcentage
overhead_percentage.helper: Indirect Costoos (administration, IT, facilities) as a porcentage of direct Costoos.

is_express_delivery.label: Express Delivery
is_express_delivery.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier to reflect expedited service Costoos.

delivery_zone.label: Delivery Zone
delivery_zone.helper: Geographic zone classification affecting last-mile complexity and Costoo multipliers.

shipment_weight_kg.label: Shipment Peso (kg)
shipment_weight_kg.helper: Total Peso del shipment, including packaging. usado for Tasa base and dimensional Peso calculations.

shipment_volume_cbm.label: Shipment Volumenn (cbm)
shipment_volume_cbm.helper: Total cubic meters del shipment. usado for dimensional Peso factor and space utilization analysis.

distance_km.label: Distancia (km)
distance_km.helper: Total Transportee Distancia from origin to destination. Influences Combustible surcharge and Tiempo-based Costoos.

transport_mode.label: Transportee Mode
transport_mode.helper: Mode of Transportee. Each mode has distinct Costoo structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

fuel_surcharge_percent.label: Combustible Surcharge (%)
fuel_surcharge_percent.helper: porcentage applied to base freight Tasa to account for Combustible Precio variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

accessorial_charges_usd.label: Accessorial Charges (USD)
accessorial_charges_usd.helper: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

density_factor.label: Densidad Factor (kg/cbm)
density_factor.helper: Actual Densidad del shipment. usado to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable Peso.

is_hazardous.label: Hazardous Material
is_hazardous.helper: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

is_expedited.label: Expedited Service
is_expedited.helper: If true, applies a premium multiplier for Tiempo-definite delivery.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Precio (USD)
purchase_price.helper: Initial acquisition Costoo del vehicle, including taxes and fees.

residual_value.label: Residual Valor (USD)
residual_value.helper: Estimated market Valor del vehicle at the end del holding poriod.

holding_period_years.label: Holding poriod (Años)
holding_period_years.helper: Expected number of Años the vehicle will be owned and usado.

annual_mileage.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
annual_mileage.helper: Average miles driven por year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method usado to allocate depreciation expense over the holding poriod.

maintenance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Maintenance Costoo (USD)
maintenance_cost_per_year.helper: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

fuel_efficiency_mpg.label: Combustible Efficiency (MPG)
fuel_efficiency_mpg.helper: Miles por gallon, usado to estimate Combustible Costoo and Total Costoooo of ownership.

fuel_price_per_gallon.label: Combustible Precio por Gallon (USD)
fuel_price_per_gallon.helper: Corriente or projected average Combustible Precio for the vehicle's Combustible type.

insurance_cost_per_year.label: Annual Insurance Costoo (USD)
insurance_cost_per_year.helper: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

discount_rate.label: Discount Tasa (%)
discount_rate.helper: Annual discount Tasa usado for Netoo present Valor calculations (Costoo of capital).

vehicle_type.label: Vehicle Type
vehicle_type.helper: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

crop_type.label: Crop Type
crop_type.helper: DePlazoines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

target_yield.label: Objetivo Yield
target_yield.helper: Expected harvest por hectare, se utiliza para calcular total nutrient demand.

soil_nitrogen.label: Soil Nitrogen (N) Content
soil_nitrogen.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the Importe of N fertilizer needed.

soil_phosphorus.label: Soil Phosphorus (P) Content
soil_phosphorus.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the Importe of P fertilizer needed.

soil_potassium.label: Soil Potassium (K) Content
soil_potassium.helper: Measured from soil test; influences the Importe of K fertilizer needed.

application_efficiency.label: Application Efficiency Factor
application_efficiency.helper: porcentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

fertilizer_type_n.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_n.helper: Diffealquiler sources have diffealquiler N concentration and loss characteristics.

fertilizer_type_p.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_p.helper: Diffealquiler sources have diffealquiler P concentration and solubility.

fertilizer_type_k.label: Potassium Fertilizer Type
fertilizer_type_k.helper: Diffealquiler sources have diffealquiler K concentration and salt index.

soil_moisture.label: Soil Moisture Content
soil_moisture.helper: Affects nutrient Disponibilidad and leaching risk; usado in loss adjustment.

rainfall_forecast.label: Rainfall Forecast (next 7 Días)
rainfall_forecast.helper: Expected precipitation; high rainfall increases N loss via leaching and denitrification.

organic_matter.label: Soil Organic Matter
organic_matter.helper: Contributes to nutrient supply; higher OM reduces fertilizer requirement.

target_population.label: Objetivo Plant Population (plants/ha)
target_population.helper: Desired final stand count por hectare based on agronomic recommendations and yield goals.

germination_rate.label: Germination Tasa (%)

gender.label: Gender

capacityvolume.label: Maximum Capacity Volumenn

age.label: Age
age.helper: Age affects basal metabolic Tasa (BMR) due to changes in lean body mass and hormonal factors.

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender influences BMR through diferencias in body composition and hormonal profiles.

weight.label: Peso

height.label: Altura

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity multiplier adjusts TDEE based on occupational and exercise habits.

goalrate.label: Peso Loss Tasa

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat porcentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional Entrada for more accuTasa BMR estimation using the Katch-McArdle formula.

natural_gas_therms.helper: Annual natural gas usage from utility bills. Scope 1 emission source.

fuel_gasoline_liters.label: Gasoline Combustible Consumo (Fleet)

waste_tonnes.helper: Total Despordicio sent to landfill or incineration. Scope 3 emission source.

workpiece_material_hardness.helper: ISO 18265: Brinell hardness; affects cutting force and chatter.

total_sq_ft.label: Total Área (sq ft)

desired_margin_percent.helper: Objetivo Netoo profit margin on the bid.

api_call_volume.helper: Total number of API calls made por month, including successful and overrun calls.

data_egress_gb.helper: Total data transferred out del cloud por month.

sla_penalty_percentage.helper: porcentage of monthly service fee credited as penalty if SLA is breached.

tolerance_class.label: Tolerance Class

unit_cost_per_inch.label: Unit Costoo por Inch
unit_cost_per_inch.helper: Costoo por inch of Material or product, usado for Costoo estimation in Lean/Six Sigma projects.

batch_quantity.label: Batch Cantidad

stock_volume_cm3.helper: Volumenn of raw Material block before machining, dePlazoines Material usage.

machine_hourly_rate_usd.label: Machine Hourly Tasa ($/hr)

labor_hourly_rate_usd.label: Labor Hourly Tasa ($/hr)

cobot_purchase_price.label: Cobot Purchase Precio

system_pressure.label: System Presión

compressorflowrate.label: Flujo del compresor Tasa

demandflowrate.label: Average Demand Flujo Tasa
demandflowrate.helper: Average compressed air Consumo del system.

systempressure.label: System Oporating Presión

pressuredifferential.label: Allowable Presión Diffealquilerial
pressuredifferential.helper: Maximum acceptable Presión drop during peak event.

compressorcontroltype.label: Compressor Control Type
compressorcontroltype.helper: Type of compressor capacity control, affects tank sizing factor.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temporature
ambienttemperature.helper: Average ambient temporature at compressor location.

altitude.label: Altitude Above Sea Level

systemleakagepercent.label: System Leakage Estimate
systemleakagepercent.helper: Estimated porcentage of compressed air lost to leaks.

applicationtype.label: Application Type

container_type.label: Container Type

cargo_length_cm.label: Cargo Longitud (cm)

cargo_width_cm.label: Cargo Ancho (cm)

cargo_height_cm.helper: Altura del cargo unit. Must respect container door Altura and internal Altura.

actual_throughput.label: Actual Throughput (units)
actual_throughput.helper: Total units produced or delivered in the measurement poriod.

defect_rate.label: Defect Tasa (ppm)
defect_rate.helper: Parts por million defective, measured por Six Sigma standards.

on_time_delivery_percent.label: On-Tiempo Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_percent.helper: porcentage of orders delivered on or before the promised date.

cost_per_unit.label: Costoo por Unit ($)

target_cost_per_unit.label: Objetivo Costoo por Unit ($)

incentive_base_rate.label: Incentive Base Tasa ($/unit)

delivery_threshold_percent.label: Delivery Threshold (%)

contract_type.label: Contract Type

lean_certification_active.label: Lean Certification Active

cpk.label: Process Capability Index (Cpk)

confidencelevel.label: Confidence Level

useconfidenceinterval.label: Use Confidence Interval

actual_duration_days.label: Actual Duración (Días)

use_earned_schedule.label: Use Earned Schedule Method

expected_yield.label: Expected Yield (kg/ha)

actual_yield.label: Actual Yield (kg/ha)
actual_yield.helper: Measured yield at harvest, usado as baseline for loss calculation.

harvest_loss_pct.label: Harvest Loss (%)
harvest_loss_pct.helper: porcentage of crop lost during harvesting oporations (shattering, header loss, etc.).

pest_pressure.label: Pest Presión (0-10)

disease_index.label: Disease Index (0-10)
disease_index.helper: Subjective rating of disease severity (0 = none, 10 = total loss).

weed_cover_pct.label: Weed Cover (%)

soil_quality_score.label: Soil Quality Score (0-100)
soil_quality_score.helper: Aggregate soil health metric (organic matter, pH, structure, etc.).

labor_efficiency.label: Labor Efficiency (0-100)
labor_efficiency.helper: Rating of labor productivity and skill level in field oporations.

equipment_reliability.label: Equipment Reliability (0-100)
equipment_reliability.helper: porcentage of Tiempo equipment opeTasas without breakdown during critical poriods.

exposure_amount.label: Exposure Importe (in base currency)
exposure_amount.helper: Total Valor of foreign currency receivables or payables subject to exchange Tasa fluctuation.

volatility_annual.label: Annualized Volatility of Exchange Tasa
volatility_annual.placeholder: Introduzca annualized volatility of exchange tasa
volatility_annual.helper: Historical or implied standard deviation of daily log returns annualized (ISO 31000 risk metric).

confidence_level.label: Confidence Level for VaR Calculation
confidence_level.placeholder: Introduzca confidence level for var calculation
confidence_level.helper: Statistical confidence level usado in Valor At Risk (VaR) estimation, typical Valors 90%, 95%, 99%.

hedge_ratio.label: Hedge Ratio
hedge_ratio.helper: porcentage of exposure covered by hedging instruments (forwards, options). Lean metric for Despordicio reduction.

time_horizon_days.label: Tiempo Horizon (Días)
time_horizon_days.helper: Risk assessment poriod aligned with business planning cycles (WERC supply chain standard).

enable_lean_adjustment.label: Enable Lean Volatility Adjustment
enable_lean_adjustment.helper: Applies a Six Sigma-based correction factor to account for process variation in hedging execution.

cutvolume.label: Cut Volumenn
cutvolume.helper: Total Volumenn of Material to be excavated from cut Áreas, measured in bank cubic meters (BCM).

fillvolume.label: Fill Volumenn
fillvolume.helper: Total Volumenn of Material required for fill/embankment Áreas, measured in compacted cubic meters (CCM).

materialtype.label: Material Type

useoptimizedhaulroutes.label: Use Optimized Haul Routes

unit_cost.label: Unit Costoo ($)

holding_cost_rate.label: Annual Holding Costoo Tasa (%)

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Costoo ($/order)

stockout_cost_per_unit.label: Stockout Costoo por Unit ($)

periods_per_year.label: poriods por Year

revenue_per_unit.label: Revenue por Unit

direct_labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Costoo por Hour

waste_percentage.label: Despordicio / rework Tasa (%)

water_cost_per_m3.label: Water Costoo (USD/m³)
water_cost_per_m3.helper: Costoo of fresh water and Despordiciowater treatment.

water_usage_l_per_kg.label: Uso de agua (L/kg fabric)
water_usage_l_per_kg.helper: Typical water Consumo por kg of fabric processed.

fabric_weight_kg.helper: Peso of fabric in the batch.

dye_type.label: Dye class
dye_type.helper: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and Costoo.

use_lean_optimization.label: Enable Lean optimization (reduce Despordicio)
use_lean_optimization.helper: If true, applies lean principles to reduce Despordicio and rework.

total_energy_kwh.label: Total Energía Consumo (kWh)
total_energy_kwh.helper: Total electrical Energía consumed by the facility over the reporting poriod (e.g., monthly).

peak_demand_kw.label: Peak Demand (kW)

co2_emission_factor.helper: Grid average emission factor for the region (ISO 14064).

waste_volume_kg.helper: Total mass of Despordicio geNetooasad in the reporting poriod.

disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Disposal Costoo por kg

annual_demand.label: Annual Demand (units)

ordering_cost.label: Ordering Costoo por Order
ordering_cost.helper: Fixed Costoooo incurred por purchase order (e.g., administrative, inspection, Transporteeation Preparación).

holding_cost_per_unit.label: Holding Costoo por Unit por Year

labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Hourly wage of cutting oporator, usado for labor Costoo estimation.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Costoo

waste_type.label: Despordicio Type
waste_type.helper: Type of plastic Despordicio being recycled; affects processing parameters and yield.

carbon_price.label: Precio del carbono

annual_production_volume.label: Annual Production Volumenn
annual_production_volume.helper: Total number of units produced por year across all product variants.

avg_batch_size.label: Average Batch Size
avg_batch_size.helper: Average number of units produced por production run before changeover.

current_setup_time.label: Corriente Preparación Tiempo por Changeover
current_setup_time.placeholder: Introduzca corriente preparación Tiempo por changeover
current_setup_time.helper: Tiempo required to change from one product to another in the Corriente system.

target_setup_time.label: Objetivo Preparación Tiempo por Changeover (after FMS)
target_setup_time.placeholder: Introduzca objetivo preparación Tiempo por changeover (after fms)
target_setup_time.helper: Expected Preparación Tiempo after implementing flexible manufacturing system (e.g., SMED).

changeover_cost_per_hour.label: Changeover Costoo por Hour (downtime + labor)

changeover_cost_per_hour.helper: Total Costoooo incurred por hour of changeover, including lost production and labor.

avg_inventory_value.helper: Corriente average Valor of raw Materials, WIP, and finished goods inventory.

fms_useful_life.label: FMS Vida útil
fms_useful_life.helper: Expected oporational life del flexible manufacturing system for depreciation purposes.

discount_rate.label: Discount Tasa (WACC)
discount_rate.helper: Pesoed average Costoo of capital usado for Netoo present Valor calculation.

product_variants.label: Number of Product Variants
product_variants.helper: Total number of distinct product variants produced annually.

quality_defect_rate.label: Corriente Quality Defect Tasa
quality_defect_rate.helper: porcentage of units that are defective and require rework or scrap.

fms_quality_improvement.label: Expected Quality Improvement from FMS
fms_quality_improvement.placeholder: Introduzca expected quality improvement from fms
fms_quality_improvement.helper: Expected porcentage reduction in defect Tasa after implementing FMS.

cost_per_defect.label: Costoo por Defect (rework + scrap)
cost_per_defect.helper: Average Costoo to rework or scrap a defective unit.

labor_productivity_gain.label: Labor Productivity Gain from FMS
labor_productivity_gain.placeholder: Introduzca labor productivity gain from fms
labor_productivity_gain.helper: Expected porcentage increase in labor productivity due to automation and reduced manual handling.

floor_space_reduction.label: Floor Space Reduction
floor_space_reduction.helper: Expected porcentage reduction in manufacturing floor space due to compact FMS layout.

annual_floor_space_cost.label: Annual Floor Space Costoo por sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.placeholder: Introduzca annual floor space Costoo por sq ft
annual_floor_space_cost.helper: Annual Costoo por square foot of manufacturing space (alquiler, utilities, maintenance).

current_floor_space.label: Corriente Floor Space
current_floor_space.helper: Total manufacturing floor space Corrientely occupied.

energy_cost_reduction.label: Energía Costoo Reduction from FMS
energy_cost_reduction.placeholder: Introduzca energía Costoo reduction from fms
energy_cost_reduction.helper: Expected porcentage reduction in Energía Costoos due to more efficient equipment and reduced idle Tiempo.

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energía Costoo
annual_energy_cost.helper: Total annual Energía Costoo for the manufacturing facility.

maintenance_cost_increase.label: Maintenance Costoo Increase from FMS
maintenance_cost_increase.placeholder: Introduzca maintenance Costoo increase from fms
maintenance_cost_increase.helper: Expected porcentage increase in maintenance Costoos due to more complex equipment.

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Costoo (Corriente)
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Corriente annual maintenance Costoo for existing equipment.

training_cost.label: Training Costoo for FMS
training_cost.helper: One-Tiempo Costoo for training oporators and maintenance staff on the new FMS.

implementation_time.label: Implementation Tiempo
implementation_time.helper: Tiempo required to fully implement the flexible manufacturing system.

production_days_per_year.label: Production Días por Year
production_days_per_year.helper: Number of Días the facility opeTasas por year.

shifts_per_day.label: Shifts por Day
shifts_per_day.helper: Number of production shifts por day.

total_production_kg.label: Total Production (kg)
total_production_kg.helper: Total Peso of finished goods produced in the reporting poriod (ISO 14051 Material Flujo).

cost_per_kg.label: Costoo por kg

waste_disposal_cost_per_kg.label: Despordicio Disposal Costoo por kg

rework_percentage.helper: porcentage of production that requires rework (Lean Six Sigma defect Tasa).

labor_hourly_rate.label: Labor Hourly Tasa
labor_hourly_rate.helper: Average fully loaded labor Costoo por hour (including benefits).

rework_hours_per_kg.label: Rework Horas por kg
rework_hours_per_kg.helper: Average Labor Horas required to rework one kg of product.

storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.label: Storage Costoo por kg por Day
storage_cost_per_kg_per_day.placeholder: Introduzca storage Costoo por kg por day

waste_type.label: Despordicio Type

actual_distance_km.label: Actual Route Distancia

fuel_price_per_liter.label: Combustible Precio por Liter
fuel_price_per_liter.helper: Corriente market Precio of diesel or gasoline por liter.

load_weight_tonnes.label: Load Peso

cost_per_unit.label: Costoo por Unit ($)

target_cost_per_unit.helper: Budgeted or standard Costoo por unit. Must be >0.

safety_incidents.helper: Total recordable incidents por year. Lower is better (ISO 45001).

on_time_delivery_pct.label: On-Tiempo Delivery (%)
on_time_delivery_pct.helper: porcentage of orders delivered on or before promised date. WERC metric.

unit_cost_per_kg.label: Unit Costoo por kg ($)
unit_cost_per_kg.helper: Standard Costoo of raw Materials por kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

rework_percentage.label: Rework porcentage (%)
rework_percentage.helper: Estimated fraction del affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

rework_cost_per_kg.helper: Additional Costoo por kilogram for rework activities (labor, Energía, extra Materials).

downtime_hours.helper: Total production downtime causado by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

hourly_overhead_rate.label: Hourly Overhead Tasa ($/hr)
hourly_overhead_rate.helper: Burdened overhead Costoo por hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility Costoos).

regulatory_penalty_flag.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
regulatory_penalty_flag.helper: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

base_penalty_amount.label: Base Penalty Importe ($)
base_penalty_amount.helper: Estimated base fine or penalty if regulatory action is taken. usado only when regulatory_penalty_flag is true.

recall_cost_flag.label: Recall Costoo Included?
recall_cost_flag.helper: Check if the deviation requires a product recall, adding logistics, testing, and brand damage Costoos.

recall_fixed_cost.label: Recall Fixed Costoooo ($)
recall_fixed_cost.helper: Fixed Costoooo associated with initiating a recall (notification, logistics, testing).

recall_variable_per_kg.label: Recall Variable Costoooo por kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.placeholder: Introduzca recall Variable Costoooo por kg ($/kg)
recall_variable_per_kg.helper: por-kilogram Costoo for recall handling (Transportee, disposal, replacement).

data_confidence.label: Data Confidence (0-1)
data_confidence.helper: Subjective confidence in the accuracy of Entrada data (0 = low, 1 = high). usado to adjust the final Costoo estimate.

design_ua.label: Design Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient × Área (UA_design)

design_ua.helper: Clean design UA from manufacturer datasheet or initial commissioning test (ISO 50001:2018, Annex B).

hot_inlet_temp.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temporature
hot_inlet_temp.helper: Temporature of hot process stream entering the heat exchanger.

cold_inlet_temp.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temporature
cold_inlet_temp.helper: Temporature of cooling or heating utility entering the exchanger.

hot_flow_rate.label: Hot Fluid Mass Flujo Tasa
hot_flow_rate.placeholder: Introduzca hot fluid mass flujo tasa
hot_flow_rate.helper: Mass Flujo Tasa del hot process stream.

hot_specific_heat.label: Hot Fluid Specific Heat Capacity
hot_specific_heat.placeholder: Introduzca hot fluid specific heat capacity
hot_specific_heat.helper: Average specific heat of hot fluid over oporating temporature range.

energy_cost.label: Energía Costoo
energy_cost.helper: Costoo of thermal Energía (steam, hot water, or electricity for pumping).

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oporating Horas por Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual oporating Horas del heat exchanger.

production_loss_factor.label: Production Loss Factor
production_loss_factor.helper: porcentage of production capacity lost due to reduced heat transfer (e.g., slower throughput).

revenue_per_unit_product.label: Revenue por Unit Product
revenue_per_unit_product.helper: Revenue geNetooasad por kg of product processed through the exchanger.

exchanger_type.label: Heat Exchanger Type
exchanger_type.helper: Type of heat exchanger; affects fouling factors and cleaning intervals.

fouling_factor_known.label: Fouling Factor Known?
fouling_factor_known.helper: If true, user provides measured fouling factor directly; otherwise calculated from UA ratio.

measured_fouling_factor.label: Measured Fouling Factor (R_f)
measured_fouling_factor.helper: Directly measured fouling resistance from test or literature (TEMA standards).

horsepower.label: HorsePotencia (HP)
horsepower.helper: Mechanical Potencia rating of motor or engine. Typical range for industrial motors: 0.5–5000 hp.

hp_type.label: HorsePotencia Type
hp_type.helper: Diffealquiler horsePotencia definitions affect conversion factor. Mechanical HP = 745.7 W, Metric HP = 735.5 W, Electrical HP = 746 W.

motor_efficiency.label: Motor Efficiency
motor_efficiency.helper: Efficiency del motor at Tasad load. Typical IE3 motors: 90–95%, IE4: 95–97%.

load_factor.label: Factor de carga
load_factor.helper: porcentage of Tasad load at which the motor opeTasas. Underloaded motors reduce efficiency.

power_factor.label: Potencia Factor
power_factor.helper: Ratio of real Potencia to appaalquiler Potencia. Typical industrial motors: 0.8–0.95 lagging.

operating_hours_per_year.label: Oporating Horas por Year
operating_hours_per_year.helper: Annual Tiempo de ejecución for Energía Costoo calculations. Common Valors: 2000 (single shift), 4000 (two shifts), 8000 (continuous).

electricity_cost_per_kwh.label: Electricity Costoo
electricity_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average industrial electricity Tasa. Range: $0.05–$0.30 in most regions.

cooling_load.label: Cooling Load
cooling_load.helper: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

heating_load.label: Heating Load
heating_load.helper: Total Pérdida de calor from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

system_type.label: System Type
system_type.helper: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

ambient_temperature.label: Ambient Temporature
ambient_temperature.helper: Outdoor dry-bulb temporature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

relative_humidity.label: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity.helper: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil Rendimiento.

efficiency_ratio.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
efficiency_ratio.helper: Corriente system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

airflow_rate.label: AirFlujo Tasa
airflow_rate.helper: Supply air Volumenn, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

duct_leakage_factor.label: Duct Leakage Factor
duct_leakage_factor.helper: Estimated leakage as porcentage of total airFlujo; affects effective capacity.

occupancy_density.label: Occupancy Densidad
occupancy_density.helper: People por square meter, impacts internal heat gain (ASHRAE 62.1).

is_preventive_maintenance_active.label: Preventive Maintenance Active
is_preventive_maintenance_active.helper: Indicates if PM schedule is followed; affects degradation factor.

flow_rate.label: Flujo Tasa
flow_rate.helper: Volumenntric Flujo Tasa of hydraulic fluid through the system. Typical range for industrial systems: 10-500 L/min.

pressure_drop_total.label: Total Presión Drop
pressure_drop_total.helper: Sum of all Presión losses across components (pipes, valves, fittings). ISO 4409 recommends measurement at steady state.

fluid_density.label: Fluid Densidad
fluid_density.helper: Densidad of hydraulic fluid at oporating temporature. Typical mineral oil: 850-900 kg/m³.

kinematic_viscosity.label: Kinematic Viscosity
kinematic_viscosity.helper: Fluid viscosity at oporating temporature. ISO VG 46 is common for industrial hydraulics.

pipe_length.label: Total Pipe Longitud
pipe_length.helper: Total Longitud of hydraulic piping in the system. Longer runs increase friction losses.

pipe_diameter.label: Pipe Inner Diámetro
pipe_diameter.helper: Inner Diámetro del main hydraulic pipe. Affects Flujo velocity and Reynolds number.

valve_count.label: Number of Valves

inspection_rate.helper: porcentage of units inspected. usado to adjust hidden loss estimates.

loss_function_type.label: Loss Function Type

include_hidden_factory.helper: If true, adds estimated losses from rework, inspection, and scrap that are not captured by the basic loss function.

available_work_time_seconds.label: Available Work Tiempo por Shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.placeholder: Introduzca available work Tiempo por shift (seconds)
available_work_time_seconds.helper: Total planned production Tiempo por shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

customer_demand_per_shift.label: Customer Demand por Shift (units)
customer_demand_per_shift.helper: Number of units required by the customer por shift.

cycle_time_seconds.label: Actual Cycle Tiempo (seconds)
cycle_time_seconds.helper: Measured average Tiempo to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck oporation.

changeover_time_minutes.label: Average Changeover Tiempo (minutes)
changeover_time_minutes.helper: Tiempo required to switch from one product variant to another, including Preparación and adjustments.

batch_size.label: Average Batch Size (units)
batch_size.helper: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Direct Labor Costoo por Hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.placeholder: Introduzca direct labor Costoo por hour ($)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production oporators.

overhead_rate_percent.label: Overhead Tasa (%)
overhead_rate_percent.helper: porcentage of direct labor Costoo allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., suporvision, utilities, maintenance).

demand_variability_coefficient.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
demand_variability_coefficient.helper: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; usado to quantify demand uncertainty.

flexibility_strategy.label: Flexibility StTasagy
flexibility_strategy.helper: Production stTasagy to handle demand variability: mixed-model (quick changeovers), dedicated lines (fixed product lines), chase demand (vary capacity), or level schedule (stable production with inventory).

age.label: Age

gender.label: Gender
gender.helper: Gender-specific coefficients for BMR estimation por ISO 8996 and clinical standards.

weight.label: Body Peso
weight.helper: Primary driver of Energía expenditure; usado in all BMR formulas.

height.label: Altura
height.helper: Altura influences lean body mass and BMR; usado in Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict.

activitylevel.label: Activity Level
activitylevel.helper: Physical activity level (PAL) multiplier por WHO/FAO and ISO 8996 metabolic Tasa classification.

bodyfatpercent.label: Body Fat porcentage
bodyfatpercent.helper: Optional Entrada for Katch-McArdle formula; improves accuracy for lean mass estimation.

isathlete.label: Athlete Mode
isathlete.helper: Activates adjusted activity multipliers for high-frequency training (6+ sessions/week).

production_volume_meters.label: Monthly Production Volumenn (meters)
production_volume_meters.helper: Total fabric produced por month, usado as baseline for Despordicio ratio calculations.

fabric_type.label: Fabric Type
fabric_type.helper: Diffealquiler fabric types have distinct Despordicio generation profiles and recycling potential.

waste_percentage.label: Corriente Despordicio porcentage (%)
waste_percentage.helper: Measured Despordicio as a porcentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

rework_rate.label: Rework Tasa (%)
rework_rate.helper: porcentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

defect_density.label: Defect Densidad (defects por 1000 meters)
defect_density.helper: Number of defects por 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

energy_cost_per_kwh.label: Energía Costoo ($/kWh)
energy_cost_per_kwh.helper: Average electricity Costoo, se utiliza para calcular Energía Despordicio from inefficient processes.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Costoo ($/hour)
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Average hourly wage, usado to quantify labor Despordicio from rework and idle Tiempo.

recycling_capability.label: Recycling Capability
recycling_capability.helper: Corriente ability to recycle Despordicio fabric, affecting Despordicio disposal Costoo and environmental impact.

iso_14001_certified.label: ISO 14001 Certified
iso_14001_certified.helper: Indicates if the facility has ISO 14001 environmental management certification, influencing Despordicio reduction practices.

material_type.label: Material Type
material_type.helper: Seleccione Material category to apply appropriate thermal conductivity ranges and correction factors por ISO 8301.

temperature_k.label: Oporating Temporature
temperature_k.helper: Mean temporature del Material during oporation. Affects phonon scattering and electron Transportee in solids.

thickness_m.label: Espesor
thickness_m.helper: Material Espesor in the direction of heat Flujo. usado for thermal resistance calculation.

cross_section_area_m2.label: Cross-Sectional Área
cross_section_area_m2.helper: Área porpendicular to heat Flujo. Critical for heat flux Densidad calculations.

heat_flow_w.label: Heat Flujo Tasa
heat_flow_w.helper: Steady-state heat transfer Tasa through the Material. Measured via calorimeter or heat flux sensor.

temperature_delta_k.label: Temporature diferencia

moisture_content_pct.label: Moisture Content
moisture_content_pct.helper: porcentage of moisture by Volumenn. Increases effective thermal conductivity in porous Materials (WERC guidelines).

aging_factor.label: Aging Factor
aging_factor.helper: Multiplier accounting for Material degradation over Tiempo. Based on Six Sigma aging studies.

measurement_confidence.label: Measurement Confidence
measurement_confidence.helper: Confidence level in Entrada data quality. Affects data confidence adjustment in outputs.

observed_time.label: Observed Tiempo (seconds)
observed_time.helper: Average cycle Tiempo recorded during direct observation, excluding any abnormal delays.

performance_rating.label: Rendimiento Rating (%)
performance_rating.helper: Oporator pace relative to normal (100% = standard pace). Based on Westinghouse or similar rating system.

allowance_percentage.label: Allowance porcentage (%)
allowance_percentage.helper: Total allowance for fatigue, porsonal needs, and unavoidable delays (ISO 9001 / ILO guidelines).

frequency_per_cycle.label: Frequency por Cycle
frequency_per_cycle.helper: How many times the observed element occurs por complete work cycle (e.g., 2 inspections por assembly).

work_measurement_method.label: Work Measurement Method
work_measurement_method.helper: The technique usado to obtain the observed Tiempo; affects confidence and adjustment factors.

include_learning_curve.label: Include Learning Curve Adjustment
include_learning_curve.helper: If true, applies a learning curve factor (80% slope) for new or changed processes.

tool_cost.label: Tool Costoooo por Unit
tool_cost.helper: Purchase Precio of a single cutting tool or insert.

tool_life_parts.label: Tool Life (Parts por Tool)
tool_life_parts.helper: Average number of parts produced before tool replacement es obligatorio.

replacement_time_min.label: Replacement Tiempo
replacement_time_min.helper: Tiempo required to replace or index the tool.

machine_hourly_rate.label: Machine Hourly Tasa
machine_hourly_rate.helper: Fully burdened Costoo por hour of machine oporation (including labor, overhead, depreciation).

rework_rate.label: Rework Tasa due to Wear
rework_rate.placeholder: Introduzca rework tasa due to wear
rework_rate.helper: porcentage of parts requiring rework due to tool wear, based on Six Sigma defect tracking.

rework_cost_per_part.label: Rework Costoo por Part
rework_cost_per_part.helper: Average Costoo to rework a defective part (Material, labor, overhead).

scrap_rate.label: Scrap Tasa due to Wear
scrap_rate.placeholder: Introduzca scrap tasa due to wear
scrap_rate.helper: porcentage of parts scrapped due to tool wear beyond tolerance.

scrap_material_cost.label: Scrap Material Costoo por Part
scrap_material_cost.placeholder: Introduzca scrap Material Costoo por part
scrap_material_cost.helper: Costoo of raw Material lost por scrapped part.

tool_type.label: Tool Type
tool_type.helper: Material del cutting tool, affects wear Tasa and Costoo multipliers.

coolant_used.label: Coolant usado
coolant_used.helper: Indicates if coolant is usado; affects tool life and wear Tasa.

purchase_price.label: Purchase Precio
purchase_price.helper: Initial capital expenditure for acquiring the asset (ISO 15663 lifecycle Costooing).

annual_energy_cost.label: Annual Energía Costoo
annual_energy_cost.helper: Yearly electricity, Combustible, or other Energía Consumo Costoos (Lean Energía efficiency).

annual_maintenance_cost.label: Annual Maintenance Costoo
annual_maintenance_cost.helper: Planned and unplanned maintenance expenses (Six Sigma reliability).

annual_labor_cost.label: Annual Labor Costoo
annual_labor_cost.helper: Oporator and technician wages directly attributable to the asset (WERC DC metrics).

annual_consumables_cost.label: Annual Consumibles Costoo
annual_consumables_cost.helper: Filters, lubricants, spare parts, and other recurring supplies.

useful_life_years.label: Vida útil (Años)
useful_life_years.helper: Expected oporational lifespan por ISO 15663 or manufacturer specification.

salvage_value.label: Valor residual
salvage_value.helper: Residual Valor At end of Vida útil (accounting standard).

discount_rate.label: Discount Tasa (%)
discount_rate.helper: Pesoed average Costoo of capital or hurdle Tasa for NPV calculation.

inflation_rate.label: Inflation Tasa (%)
inflation_rate.helper: Expected annual inflation for future Costoo escalation.

utilization_hours_per_year.label: Utilization Horas por Year
utilization_hours_per_year.helper: Actual oporating Horas por year (OEE Disponibilidad).

downtime_cost_per_hour.label: Downtime Costoo por Hour
downtime_cost_per_hour.helper: Lost revenue or penalty Costoo por hour of unplanned downtime.

expected_downtime_hours_per_year.label: Expected Downtime Horas por Year
expected_downtime_hours_per_year.placeholder: Introduzca expected downtime horas por year

training_cost_per_operator.label: Training Costoo por Oporator
training_cost_per_operator.helper: Initial and recurring training Costoo por oporator (Lean skill matrix).

number_of_operators.label: Number of Oporators
number_of_operators.helper: Direct oporators assigned to the asset.

environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.label: Environmental Compliance Costoo por Year
environmental_compliance_cost_per_year.placeholder: Introduzca environmental compliance Costoo por year

asset_type.label: Asset Type
asset_type.helper: Category influences depreciation method and maintenance factors.

depreciation_method.label: Depreciation Method
depreciation_method.helper: Accounting method for annual depreciation expense.

include_downtime.label: Include Downtime Costoos
include_downtime.helper: Toggle to include or exclude downtime-related Costoos in TCO.

base_salary.label: Base Annual Salary

bonus_percent.label: Objetivo Bonus (% of base salary)

overhead_percent.label: Overhead Allocation (% of direct Costoo)

training_cost.label: Annual Training Costoo por Employee

overtime_hours_per_week.label: Average Overtime Horas por Week

include_hidden_costs.label: Include Hidden Costoo Drivers
include_hidden_costs.helper: Toggle to include absenteeism, engagement loss, and quality Costoos.

production_cost_per_unit.label: Production Costoo por Unit (USD)

tax_rate_producer.label: Producer Entity Tax Tasa (%)

annual_volume.label: Annual Shipping Volumenn (units)

avg_shipment_weight.label: Average Shipment Peso (kg)

carbon_tax_per_ton_co2.placeholder: Introduzca carbon tax (usd por ton co2)

num_employees.label: Number of Empleados

annual_turnover_rate.label: Annual Turnover Tasa

avg_salary.placeholder: Introduzca average annual salary por employee

exit_interview_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Introduzca exit interview Costoo por leaver

overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Introduzca overtime cover Costoo por leaver
overtime_cover_cost_per_leaver.helper: Extra pay for Restante staff covering duties.

customer_impact_cost_per_leaver.placeholder: Introduzca customer impact Costoo por leaver

sellingprice.label: Selling Precio por unit

overheadrate.label: Overhead Tasa (% of direct labor)

avg_inventory_turns.placeholder: Introduzca average inventory turns por year
avg_inventory_turns.helper: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.

labor_cost_per_hour.label: Labor Costoo por Hour
labor_cost_per_hour.helper: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse oporators.

equipment_cost_per_hour.label: Equipment Costoo por Hour
equipment_cost_per_hour.helper: Hourly Costoo of Material handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).

order_lines_per_day.label: Order Lines por Day
order_lines_per_day.helper: Average number of order lines processed daily.

storage_utilization.label: Storage Utilization Tasa

workdaysperyear.label: Work Días por Year
workdaysperyear.helper: Number of oporating Días por year.

avgwateruseperpersonperday.helper: Estimated daily water Consumo por employee (drinking, sanitation, cleaning).
