seasonalfactor.label: Seasonal Adjustment Factor
seasonalfactor.helper: Multiplier to account for seasonal variations (e.g., summer peak).

industrytype.label: Industry Type
industrytype.helper: Seleccione industry sector to apply appropriate benchmarks.

totalwaterin.label: Total Water Entrada (m³)
totalwaterin.helper: Total Volumenn of water entering the facility from all sources (municipal, well, recycled).

productionoutput.label: Production Output (units)
productionoutput.helper: Total number of units produced in the reporting poriod.

processwater.label: Process Water usado (m³)
processwater.helper: Water directly usado in manufacturing processes (e.g., cooling, rinsing, chemical mixing).

coolingwater.label: Cooling Water Makeup (m³)
coolingwater.helper: Water added to cooling towers or closed-loop systems to compensate for evaporation and blowdown.

wastewaterdischarge.label: Despordiciowater Discharge (m³)
wastewaterdischarge.helper: Volumenn of Despordiciowater discharged to sewer or treatment facility.

recycledwater.label: Recycled Water (m³)
recycledwater.helper: Volumenn of water treated and reusado within the facility.

leakagelosses.label: Leakage Losses (m³)
leakagelosses.helper: Estimated water lost through leaks in pipes, valves, and fixtures.

industrytype.label: Industry Type
industrytype.helper: Industry classification usado for benchmarking and normalization.

watercostperm3.label: Water Costoo (currency/m³)
watercostperm3.helper: Average Costoo por cubic meter of water including supply and Despordiciowater treatment.

enableadvancedanalysis.label: Enable Advanced Analysis
enableadvancedanalysis.helper: If true, enables hidden loss driver detection and suggested actions.

weld_type.label: Weld Type
weld_type.helper: DePlazoines the geometry factor and stress distribution model por AWS D1.1.

base_material_yield_strength.label: Base Material Yield Strength
base_material_yield_strength.helper: Yield strength del weaker base Material (ISO 898 / ASTM A36).

weld_material_tensile_strength.label: Weld Material Tensile Strength
weld_material_tensile_strength.helper: Tensile strength of filler metal (e.g., ER70S-6).

throat_thickness.label: Effective Garganta Espesor
throat_thickness.helper: Minimum Garganta dimension por ISO 5817 quality level B.

applied_load.label: Applied Load
applied_load.helper: Service load acting on the weld joint.

load_angle.label: Load Angle (from weld axis)
load_angle.helper: Angle between applied load and weld longitudinal axis. 90° = transverse, 0° = longitudinal.

quality_level.label: Quality Level (ISO 5817)
quality_level.helper: ISO 5817 weld quality level: B=stringent, C=modeTasa, D=basic.

inspection_method.label: Inspection Method
inspection_method.helper: NDT method usado; affects confidence factor.

is_fatigue_loading.label: Fatigue Loading
is_fatigue_loading.helper: If true, applies S-N curve reduction por AWS D1.1 fatigue categories.

joint_type.label: Joint Type
joint_type.helper: Seleccione weld joint geometry por ISO 9692. Affects Volumenn calculation formula.

plate_thickness.label: Plate Espesor (t)
plate_thickness.helper: Espesor del base metal. Critical for groove Volumenn calculation.

root_face.label: Root Face (f)
root_face.helper: Land at the root del groove. Affects effective Profundidad.

root_gap.label: Root Gap (g)
root_gap.helper: Gap between plates at root. Increases weld Volumenn.

groove_angle.label: Groove Angle (α)
groove_angle.helper: Included angle of V-groove. Standard range por AWS D1.1.

leg_length.label: Leg Longitud (for fillet)
leg_length.helper: Fillet weld leg size. Only usado when joint_type = fillet.

weld_process.label: Welding Process
weld_process.helper: Seleccione welding process. Affects deposition efficiency and Labor Tasa.

material_density.label: Material Densidad
material_density.helper: Densidad of weld metal. Steel ~7.85, Aluminum ~2.7, Stainless ~8.0.

labor_rate.label: Labor Tasa
labor_rate.helper: Hourly Costoo of welder including overhead.

overhead_rate.label: Overhead Tasa
overhead_rate.helper: porcentage added to direct labor for indirect Costoos.

consumable_cost_per_kg.label: Consumable Costoo por kg
consumable_cost_per_kg.helper: Costoo of filler metal por kilogram.

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited metal to consumed filler. Varies by process: SMAW~65%, GMAW~90%, FCAW~85%, SAW~99%, GTAW~95%.

operator_factor.label: Oporator Factor
operator_factor.helper: porcentage of total Tiempo that the welder is actually depositing metal. Typical range 20-50%.

weld_speed.label: Weld Speed
weld_speed.helper: Travel speed del welding arc. Affects deposition Tasa and Tiempo.

wire_feed_speed.label: Wire Feed Speed (if applicable)
wire_feed_speed.helper: Only for GMAW/FCAW processes. se utiliza para calcular deposition Tasa.

wire_diameter.label: Wire Diámetro
wire_diameter.helper: Diámetro of filler wire. Affects cross-sectional Área and deposition Tasa.

use_premium_data.label: Use Premium Data (historical trends)
use_premium_data.helper: If true, adjusts deposition efficiency and oporator factor based on historical data from premium database.

weld_length_mm.label: Weld Longitud (mm)
weld_length_mm.helper: Total Longitud del weld joint to be deposited.

weld_throat_mm.label: Weld Garganta Espesor (mm)
weld_throat_mm.helper: Effective Garganta Espesor del fillet or groove weld.

material_density_g_per_cm3.label: Material Densidad (g/cm³)
material_density_g_per_cm3.helper: Densidad del base and filler Material (typical steel ~7.85).

deposition_efficiency.label: Deposition Efficiency (%)
deposition_efficiency.helper: Ratio of deposited weld metal to total filler metal consumed (includes spatter and losses).

labor_rate_per_hour.label: Labor Tasa (USD/hour)
labor_rate_per_hour.helper: Fully burdened hourly labor Costoo for welder.

welding_speed_mm_per_min.label: Welding Speed (mm/min)
welding_speed_mm_per_min.helper: Travel speed del welding torch along the joint.

filler_wire_cost_per_kg.label: Filler Wire Costoo (USD/kg)
filler_wire_cost_per_kg.helper: Costoo por kilogram of filler wire or electrode.

gas_cost_per_liter.label: Shielding Gas Costoo (USD/L)
gas_cost_per_liter.helper: Costoo por liter of shielding gas (e.g., Argon/CO2 mix).

gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.label: Gas Flujo Tasa (L/min)
gas_flow_rate_l_per_min.helper: Flujo Tasa of shielding gas during welding.

welding_power_kw.label: Welding Potencia (kW)
welding_power_kw.helper: Average Potencia Consumo del welding machine during oporation.

overhead_rate_per_hour.label: Overhead Tasa (USD/hour)
overhead_rate_per_hour.helper: Facility and equipment overhead allocated por hour of welding.

rework_rate_percent.label: Rework Tasa (%)
rework_rate_percent.helper: porcentage of welds requiring rework (defect Tasa).

rework_cost_factor.label: Rework Costoo Factor
rework_cost_factor.helper: Multiplier on original Costoo to account for rework (cutting, re-welding, inspection).

weld_process_type.label: Welding Process Type
weld_process_type.helper: Standard arc welding process por AWS A3.0.

use_premium_material.label: Use Premium Filler Material
use_premium_material.helper: Toggle to apply a 20% Costoo premium for high-Rendimiento filler wire.

basic_wind_speed.label: Basic Wind Speed (V)
basic_wind_speed.helper: Design wind speed at 10m Altura for the location, typically from local building codes.

terrain_category.label: Terrain Category
terrain_category.helper: Terrain roughness por ISO 4354: A=open sea, B=open country, C=suburban, D=urban.

building_height.label: Building Altura (z)
building_height.helper: Altura above ground to the top del structure.

exposure_factor.label: Exposure Factor (Ce)
exposure_factor.helper: Adjustment for local topography and shielding, por ASCE 7.

gust_factor.label: Gust Effect Factor (G)
gust_factor.helper: Dynamic response factor for wind gusts, typically 0.85 for rigid structures.

pressure_coefficient.label: Presión Coefficient (Cp)
pressure_coefficient.helper: Aerodynamic shape factor for the building surface (positive for windward, negative for leeward).

air_density.label: Air Densidad (ρ)
air_density.helper: Standard air Densidad at sea level, adjust for altitude if needed.

is_cyclic_loading.label: Cyclic Loading Consideration
is_cyclic_loading.helper: If true, applies fatigue reduction factor por ISO 4354 for dynamic wind events.

turbine_capacity.label: Turbine Tasad Capacity (MW)
turbine_capacity.helper: Nameplate capacity del wind turbine model under evaluation.

capacity_factor.label: Capacity Factor (%)
capacity_factor.helper: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

capital_cost_per_mw.label: Capital Costoo por MW (USD)
capital_cost_per_mw.helper: Total installed Costoo por MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

opex_per_mwh.label: Oporating Expenditure (USD/MWh)
opex_per_mwh.helper: Annual oporations and maintenance Costoo por MWh geNetooasad (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

electricity_price.label: Electricity Selling Precio (USD/MWh)
electricity_price.helper: Potencia purchase agreement Precio or wholesale market Precio por MWh.

discount_rate.label: Discount Tasa (%)
discount_rate.helper: Pesoed average Costoo of capital (WACC) usado for Netoo present Valor calculation.

project_lifetime.label: Project Lifetime (Años)
project_lifetime.helper: Expected oporational life del wind farm (typically 20-25 Años).

degradation_rate.label: Annual Degradation Tasa (%)
degradation_rate.helper: Expected annual reduction in Energía production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

incentive_tax_credit.label: Production Tax Credit (USD/MWh)
incentive_tax_credit.helper: Government incentive por MWh geNetooasad (e.g., US PTC).

grid_availability.label: Grid Disponibilidad (%)
grid_availability.helper: porcentage of Tiempo the grid is available to accept Potencia (curtailment factor).

turbine_type.label: Turbine Type
turbine_type.helper: Technology classification affecting O&M Costoo profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

maintenance_strategy.label: Maintenance StTasagy
maintenance_strategy.helper: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and Costoo.

material_thickness.label: Material Espesor (mm)
material_thickness.helper: Espesor del base metal to be welded, measured in millimeters.

carbon_equivalent.label: Carbon Equivalent (CE)
carbon_equivalent.helper: Carbon equivalent Valor calculated from Material composition (IIW formula).

hydrogen_level.label: Hydrogen Level (ml/100g weld metal)
hydrogen_level.helper: Diffusible hydrogen content del welding consumable, por ISO 3690.

heat_input.label: Heat Entrada (kJ/mm)
heat_input.helper: Arc Energía por unit Longitud of weld, calculated from voltage, Corriente, and travel speed.

joint_restraint.label: Joint Restraint Factor
joint_restraint.helper: Degree of mechanical restraint on the weld joint, affecting crack susceptibility.

preheat_method.label: Preheat Method
preheat_method.helper: Method usado to apply preheat, influences heating Tasa and uniformity.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Legal terms and conditions for using SectorCalc calculators and services.

terms.heroDescription: By accessing or using SectorCalc, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to SectorCalc. By accessing or using our website and calculation tools, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

section1.title: 1. Our Services
section1.content: SectorCalc provides industrial and business calculators for informational and decision-support purposes. Our tools do not constitute professional engineering, financial, or legal advice. You are solely responsible for verifying any results before making business decisions.

section2.title: 2. Premium Features & Credits
section2.content: Premium tools require credits. Credits are non-refundable and expire 12 months after purchase. You may purchase credit packages through our secure payment provider. Unused credits do not roll over.

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
section3.content: You must create an account to access premium features. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.content: All content, formulas, algorithms, designs, and trademarks are the exclusive property of Sector Calculator (operating as SectorCalc). You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.

section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
section5.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sector Calculator shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

section6.title: 6. Modifications
section6.content: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

section7.title: 7. Contact Information
section7.content: For questions about these Terms, contact us using the details below.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How SectorCalc collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

privacy.heroDescription: What data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect personal information you provide (e.g., email address when you register). We also automatically collect usage data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) to improve our tools.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use your data to operate, maintain, and improve SectorCalc, to process payments, and to communicate with you about your account or updates.

section3.title: 3. Cookies & Tracking
section3.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and optional analytics cookies (e.g., Google Analytics) to analyze usage. You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.

section4.title: 4. Data Sharing
section4.content: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with trusted third-party services (payment processors — Stripe/Paddle, hosting — Vercel) as necessary to provide our services.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention & Security
section5.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. We implement reasonable security measures, but no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at info@sectorcalc.com.

section7.title: 7. Children's Privacy
section7.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

section8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
section8.content: We may update this policy from time to time. The "Effective" date at the top indicates when the latest version was posted.

section9.title: 9. Data Controller
section9.content: The data controller for SectorCalc is:

meta.title: Refund Policy
meta.description: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions on SectorCalc.

refundPolicy.heroDescription: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. Please read this Refund Policy carefully.

section1.title: 1. Credits & Subscriptions
section1.content: Credits: Purchases of credits are final and non-refundable. Unused credits expire 12 months after purchase. No cash refunds will be issued for unused credits. Subscriptions: If you purchase a recurring subscription, you may request a full refund within 14 days of your first payment, provided you have not used any premium tool during that period. After 14 days or after first use, subscription fees are non-refundable.

section2.title: 2. Faulty or Incorrect Tools
section2.content: If a premium tool produces demonstrably incorrect results due to a bug in our system, we will refund the credits used for that calculation (up to the number of credits spent) or provide replacement credits. Please report the issue with screenshots and details to info@sectorcalc.com.

section3.title: 3. How to Request a Refund
section3.content: To request a refund, contact us at info@sectorcalc.com with your transaction ID (from your payment provider) and the reason for the request. We will respond within 7–14 business days.

section4.title: 4. Chargebacks
section4.content: If you initiate a chargeback without first contacting us, we may suspend your account until the matter is resolved.

section5.title: 5. Changes to this Policy
section5.content: We reserve the right to modify this refund policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page.

section6.title: 6. Contact Information
section6.content: For refund requests or billing questions, contact us using the details below.
